name: 矛盾报告分析与调和

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: comparison approach: read bullish then bearish sequentially vs. alternating sections vs. data-first then opinions; depth of raw data inspection
observable_attributes.output_detail: reconciliation memo detail: brief verdict vs. point-by-point analysis with evidence
observable_attributes.output_structure: memo organization: by topic vs. by report vs. verdict-first vs. evidence-first
observable_attributes.edit_strategy: whether original reports are annotated/marked or only the reconciliation memo is created

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含两份分析报告，对同一家公司（NovaTech Corp）给出了截然相反的结论：一份看涨（analysis_bullish.md），一份看跌（analysis_bearish.md）。同时还有 raw_data/ 目录中的原始数据（营收历史、市场份额、债务情况）。请：1. 仔细阅读两份报告和原始数据 2. 分析两份报告的分歧点和各自的论据 3. 用原始数据验证哪些论点有数据支撑 4. 写一份 reconciliation_memo.md 给出你的综合判断。
prompt_en: This folder contains two analysis reports reaching OPPOSITE conclusions about the same company (NovaTech Corp): one bullish (analysis_bullish.md) and one bearish (analysis_bearish.md). There is also raw_data/ directory with source data (revenue history, market share, debt profile). Please: 1. Carefully read both reports and the raw data 2. Analyze the disagreement points and each report's supporting arguments 3. Verify which arguments are supported by raw data 4. Write a reconciliation_memo.md with your integrated assessment.
behavioral_freedom: Reading order: bullish first vs. bearish first vs. raw data first
Comparison method: side-by-side point comparison vs. thematic analysis
How deeply to inspect raw data vs. trusting report claims
Whether to annotate or mark up original reports
Reconciliation style: pick a side vs. nuanced middle ground vs. uncertainty-focused
Output detail: executive summary vs. detailed point-by-point analysis
